hypotheses.title: Cryo-EM 3D Classification of P. aeruginosa OMV Populations Reveals Discrete Cargo-Defined Subclasses
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: RELION 3D classification of >50,000 OMV particles resolves >=3 discrete structural classes defined by surface protein density, diameter, and curvature — corresponding to distinct biogenesis pathways (OmpA-depleted budding, explosive lysis, active polar budding).
hypotheses.key_prediction: >=3 structurally distinct OMV classes with <20% overlap in class probability, each with different mean diameter (p<0.01) and surface protein density.

hypotheses.title: Subtomogram Averaging of OMV Budding Sites Reveals Conserved Protein Architecture at Membrane Scission
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: In situ cryo-ET + subtomogram averaging of >=100 budding intermediates reveals a ring-like protein collar at the OMV budding neck with 5-10 nm periodicity and 15-25 nm constriction diameter — analogous to dynamin in eukaryotic endocytosis.
hypotheses.key_prediction: Conserved proteinaceous collar at budding neck with >=2 nm resolution, measurable by subtomogram averaging of >=100 budding events.
grounded_claims: Subtomogram averaging of bacterial machines — Yonekura 2003, Basler 2012
OMV budding intermediates observable by cryo-ET

hypotheses.title: CryoDRGN Reveals Conformational Gating in OmpA That Controls OMV-Luminal Cargo Access
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: CryoDRGN maps OmpA conformational landscape in nanodiscs, revealing closed (peptidoglycan-bound) and open (detached, pore-forming) states. The open state creates a transient channel for periplasmic cargo access to OMV lumen during budding.
hypotheses.key_prediction: >=2 OmpA conformational states separated by >=5 A RMSD, with minor open state at 10-30% frequency showing >=2 nm channel.
grounded_claims: cryoDRGN — Zhong et al. 2021 Nature Methods
OmpA periplasmic domain flexibility — crystal structures

hypotheses.title: 3DVA of OMV-Associated T6SS Components Reveals Membrane-Piercing Cargo Injection Mechanism
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: 3DVA of T6SS baseplate contraction in situ reveals membrane displacement >=3 nm creating transient pore for effector injection into nascent OMV lumen — explaining presence of T6SS effectors in OMVs.
hypotheses.key_prediction: 3DVA first principal component shows >=10 A amplitude membrane deformation at T6SS contraction site, with transient pore >=5 nm.
grounded_claims: T6SS structure — Ge et al. 2015 Nature

hypotheses.title: Cryo-EM Classification of OMV Lipid Asymmetry Identifies LPS O-antigen Length as Primary Sorting Signal
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: 2D classification resolves LPS corona thickness on individual OMVs. Short O-antigen LPS creates lower steric barrier to curvature, producing small OMVs. Cargo sorting is passive consequence of LPS-defined membrane domains.
hypotheses.key_prediction: Inverse correlation (r < -0.5) between LPS corona thickness and OMV curvature across >10,000 particles.
grounded_claims: LPS effects on OMV production — Haurat et al. 2015

hypotheses.title: Cryo-ET Reveals OMP Barrel Clustering at Polar Budding Sites as Cargo Selection Mechanism
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: Subtomogram averaging of membrane patches at budding vs non-budding polar regions shows >=1.5x higher OMP barrel density at budding sites with 8-12 nm inter-barrel spacing, selectively enriching larger cargo barrels while excluding structural OMPs.
hypotheses.key_prediction: Budding sites show >=1.5x higher barrel density (p<0.01) and barrel diameter bias toward >=3 nm (cargo OMPs) vs <3 nm (structural OMPs) at non-budding sites.
grounded_claims: OMP enrichment at poles — IcsA, PagC examples
Subtomogram averaging of membrane proteins — Zimmerli 2021 Science
